task: pick green jalapeno chip bag from top drawer and place on counter
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A green jalapeno chip bag is on a light gray counter. A white bowl is on the counter to the left of the chip bag. A drawer is open below the counter. The chip bag is a flexible package with a printed design. STRATEGY - First, reach for the chip bag on the counter. Grasp it by its body to lift it. Then, transport it to the open drawer. Finally, place it inside the drawer. Failure modes include dropping the chip bag during transport or misplacing it outside the drawer. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the chip bag body; Step 2 grasp the chip bag body for lift; Step 3 transport to the drawer; Step 4 place inside the drawer.

Goal: inside(green_jalapeno_chip_bag, drawer)
Scene: green_jalapeno_chip_bag, white_bowl, drawer, counter
Step 1: reach(green_jalapeno_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green jalapeno chip bag
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_jalapeno_chip_bag, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_jalapeno_chip_bag) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(green_jalapeno_chip_bag)
  affordance_region: the body of the green jalapeno chip bag
  contact: holding(green_jalapeno_chip_bag) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_jalapeno_chip_bag)
Step 3: transport(green_jalapeno_chip_bag -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the open drawer
  spatial: above(green_jalapeno_chip_bag, drawer, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_jalapeno_chip_bag)
  done_when: above(green_jalapeno_chip_bag, drawer, 0.05)
Step 4: place(green_jalapeno_chip_bag -> drawer)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the open drawer
  contact: surface_contact(green_jalapeno_chip_bag, drawer) [completion]; released(green_jalapeno_chip_bag) [completion]
  pose: inside(green_jalapeno_chip_bag, drawer) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(green_jalapeno_chip_bag, drawer) AND released(green_jalapeno_chip_bag)
<END_OF_PLAN>
